loc_aethelgard.name: Aethelgard
loc_aethelgard.description: The great western continent. A massive landmass housing vast empires, untamed wilderness, and ancient ruins from forgotten eras.

loc_silvermace_empire.name: Silvermace Empire
loc_silvermace_empire.description: The largest and most militant human empire in Aethelgard. Known for its heavily armored Cazan legions and strict political senate.

loc_lesdownia.name: Lesdownia
loc_lesdownia.description: A land of fractured allegiances and ancient farming traditions. Known primarily for the Tripartate Valley, it is a region where the simple life of a farmer is often interrupted by the politics of Great Houses.

loc_iron_peaks.name: The Iron Peaks
loc_iron_peaks.description: A treacherous mountain range acting as a natural border in northern Lesdownia. Rich in iron ore but plagued by freezing winds and monstrous threats.

loc_highwatch.name: Highwatch Citadel
loc_highwatch.description: A heavily fortified dwarven and human settlement built directly into the cliffs of the Iron Peaks. It serves as a mining hub and the first line of defense against northern raids.

loc_tripartate_valley.name: Tripartate Valley
loc_tripartate_valley.description: The fertile heart of Lesdownia. Most of the region's Elirium crops are harvested here, under the watchful eye of House Kirko.

loc_kirkos_rest.name: Kirko's Rest
loc_kirkos_rest.description: A bustling agricultural town in the center of the Tripartate Valley. The local taverns are always full of farmers spending their hard-earned coin after the Elirium harvest.

loc_mudbottom.name: Mudbottom
loc_mudbottom.description: A tiny, squalid settlement at the edge of the valley swamps. The people here are poor, superstitious, and deeply distrustful of outsiders or empire officials.

loc_lefkada_maw.name: Lefkada - The Maw
loc_lefkada_maw.description: A layer of Hell where the geography is as shifting and cruel as the devils that inhabit it. The air is thick with the scent of brimstone and iron.
